title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: FISH OF ALBANY INC UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with electric, gas, or water bills. Assistance is available only once per lifetime, subject to available funding, and is not guaranteed. 1035 SE 2nd Avenue Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted. Households must not have received utility related financial assistance from any agency within the past 12 month period. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 928-4460 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 928-4460 Main phone Main phone (541) 928-4460 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Albany TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the intersection of SE Main Street and SE 2nd Avenue, next to the 7-11 Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - BASIC NEEDS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FISH OF ALBANY INC
